---
title: "Google Trends"
output: html_document
date: "2026-03-06"
editor_options: 
  chunk_output_type: console
---

## Comparisons across disciplines

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Google Trends demand scoring for WFDF taxonomy activities
# using automatic OR queries for aliases
# ============================================================

# -----------------------------
# 0) Packages
# -----------------------------
pkgs <- c("gtrendsR", "dplyr", "purrr", "tibble", "readr", "ggplot2", "scales")
to_install <- pkgs[!sapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(to_install) > 0) install.packages(to_install)

library(gtrendsR)
library(dplyr)
library(purrr)
library(tibble)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(scales)

# -----------------------------
# 1) Settings
# -----------------------------
time_window <- "2021-03-07 2026-03-06"
geo_code    <- ""     # "" = worldwide, "US" = United States
gprop_type  <- "web"
n_rep       <- 1
sleep_sec   <- 20
low_value   <- 0.5

score_google_demand <- function(x) {
  case_when(
    is.na(x)        ~ NA_integer_,
    x >= 0.50       ~ 5L,
    x >= 0.10       ~ 4L,
    x >= 0.02       ~ 3L,
    x >= 0.002      ~ 2L,
    x >= 0.0002     ~ 1L,
    TRUE            ~ 0L
  )
}

# -----------------------------
# 2) Activity aliases
# -----------------------------
activity_aliases <- list(
  "Ultimate" = c("ultimate frisbee"),
  "Beach Ultimate" = c("beach ultimate"),
  "Goaltimate" = c("goaltimate"),
  "Hot Box" = c("hot box frisbee"),
  "World War Free" = c("world war frisbee"),
  "Double Disc Court" = c("double disc court", "ddc frisbee", "escape frisbee"),
  "Guts" = c("guts frisbee"),
  "Flutter Guts" = c("flutter guts frisbee"),
  "DodgeDisc" = c("dodgedisc", "dodgebee"),
  "Battle Royale" = c("battle royale frisbee"),
  "Discflect / KanJam" = c("kanjam", "discflect"),
  "Frisbee Hoops" = c("frisbee hoops"),
  "BeersBee" = c("beersbee", "polish horseshoes frisbee"),
  "Frisbee H-O-R-S-E" = c("frisbee horse"),
  "Accuracy" = c("accuracy frisbee"),
  "Disc Golf" = c("disc golf"),
  "Speed Lid Golf" = c("speed lid golf"),
  "Distance" = c("distance frisbee"),
  "Self-Caught Flight" = c("mta frisbee", "trc frisbee", "throw run catch"),
  "Discathon" = c("discathon frisbee", "discathon disc"),
  "Freestyle" = c("freestyle frisbee"),
  "Canine Disc" = c("disc dog", "canine disc"),
  "Overall" = c("overall flying disc", "overall frisbee")
)

# -----------------------------
# 3) Build one OR query per activity
# -----------------------------
build_or_query <- function(terms) {
  paste(unique(terms), collapse = " + ")
}

activity_queries <- tibble(
  activity = names(activity_aliases),
  query_term = purrr::map_chr(activity_aliases, build_or_query)
)

# inspect if desired
print(activity_queries, n = nrow(activity_queries))

# -----------------------------
# 4) Anchor groups using OR queries
#    Each entry here should match an activity name above
# -----------------------------
group_activities <- list(
  g1 = c("Disc Golf", "Ultimate", "Discflect / KanJam", "Freestyle"),
  g2 = c("Ultimate", "Beach Ultimate", "Goaltimate", "Hot Box"),
  g3 = c("Ultimate", "Guts", "Double Disc Court", "DodgeDisc"),
  g4 = c("Guts", "Flutter Guts", "Battle Royale", "BeersBee"),
  g5 = c("Discflect / KanJam", "Frisbee H-O-R-S-E", "Accuracy", "Frisbee Hoops"),
  g6 = c("Disc Golf", "Speed Lid Golf", "Distance", "Discathon"),
  g7 = c("Freestyle", "Canine Disc", "Self-Caught Flight", "Overall"),
  g8 = c("Hot Box", "World War Free", "Goaltimate", "Battle Royale")
)

# convert activity groups to Google query groups
groups <- purrr::map(group_activities, function(act_vec) {
  activity_queries %>%
    filter(activity %in% act_vec) %>%
    pull(query_term)
})

# -----------------------------
# 5) Helpers
# -----------------------------
clean_hits <- function(x, low_value = 0.5) {
  case_when(
    x == "<1" ~ low_value,
    x == ""   ~ 0,
    TRUE      ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  )
}

gt_pull_summary <- function(keywords,
                            time,
                            geo = "",
                            gprop = "web",
                            n_rep = 1,
                            low_value = 0.5,
                            sleep_seconds = 10,
                            max_attempts = 5,
                            verbose = TRUE) {

  one_pull <- function(rep_id) {
    if (verbose) {
      message("Pulling: ", paste(keywords, collapse = " | "), " [rep ", rep_id, "]")
    }

    attempt <- 1
    out <- NULL

    while (attempt <= max_attempts && is.null(out)) {
      out <- tryCatch(
        gtrends(keyword = keywords, time = time, geo = geo, gprop = gprop),
        error = function(e) {
          msg <- conditionMessage(e)

          if (grepl("429", msg, fixed = TRUE)) {
            wait_time <- sleep_seconds * (2^(attempt - 1))
            message("  429 rate limit hit. Waiting ", wait_time,
                    " seconds before retry ", attempt, "/", max_attempts)
            Sys.sleep(wait_time)
          } else {
            message("  Failed: ", paste(keywords, collapse = " | "),
                    " [rep ", rep_id, "] -> ", msg)
          }

          NULL
        }
      )

      if (is.null(out)) {
        attempt <- attempt + 1
      }
    }

    if (is.null(out) || is.null(out$interest_over_time) || nrow(out$interest_over_time) == 0) {
      return(NULL)
    }

    as_tibble(out$interest_over_time) %>%
      transmute(
        date = as.Date(date),
        keyword = as.character(keyword),
        hits_num = clean_hits(hits, low_value = low_value),
        rep = rep_id
      ) %>%
      filter(!is.na(hits_num))
  }

  pulls <- purrr::map(seq_len(n_rep), function(i) {
    if (i > 1) Sys.sleep(sleep_seconds)
    one_pull(i)
  }) %>% purrr::compact()

  if (length(pulls) == 0) return(NULL)

  dat <- bind_rows(pulls)

  rep_summaries <- dat %>%
    group_by(keyword, rep) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_hits = mean(hits_num, na.rm = TRUE),
      pct_zero  = mean(hits_num == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      pct_lt1   = mean(hits_num == low_value, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_hits  = max(hits_num, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  rep_summaries %>%
    group_by(keyword) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_hits = mean(mean_hits, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_hits   = sd(mean_hits, na.rm = TRUE),
      pct_zero  = mean(pct_zero, na.rm = TRUE),
      pct_lt1   = mean(pct_lt1, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_hits  = mean(max_hits, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_nonzero_rep = sum(mean_hits > 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_rep = n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    mutate(query = paste(keywords, collapse = " | "))
}

build_gtrends_index <- function(groups,
                                base_term,
                                time,
                                geo = "",
                                gprop = "web",
                                n_rep = 2,
                                low_value = 0.5,
                                sleep_seconds = 1,
                                verbose = TRUE) {

  group_ids <- names(groups)
  if (is.null(group_ids)) group_ids <- as.character(seq_along(groups))

  summaries <- map2_dfr(groups, group_ids, function(kw, gid) {
    s <- gt_pull_summary(
      keywords = kw,
      time = time,
      geo = geo,
      gprop = gprop,
      n_rep = n_rep,
      low_value = low_value,
      sleep_seconds = sleep_seconds,
      verbose = verbose
    )
    if (is.null(s)) return(NULL)
    mutate(s, group_id = gid)
  })

  if (nrow(summaries) == 0) stop("No usable Google Trends data returned.")

  membership <- map2_dfr(groups, group_ids, ~ tibble(group_id = .y, keyword = .x))

  base_rows <- summaries %>% filter(keyword == base_term)
  if (nrow(base_rows) == 0) stop("Base term not found in returned summaries.")

  start_group <- base_rows %>%
    slice_max(mean_hits, n = 1) %>%
    pull(group_id)

  overlaps <- inner_join(
    membership %>% rename(group_from = group_id),
    membership %>% rename(group_to = group_id),
    by = "keyword",
    relationship = "many-to-many"
  ) %>%
    filter(group_from != group_to) %>%
    distinct(group_from, group_to, keyword)

  group_scale <- setNames(rep(NA_real_, length(group_ids)), group_ids)
  group_steps <- setNames(rep(Inf, length(group_ids)), group_ids)
  group_scale[start_group] <- 1
  group_steps[start_group] <- 0

  changed <- TRUE
  iter <- 0
  max_iter <- length(group_ids) * 10

  while (changed && iter < max_iter) {
    changed <- FALSE
    iter <- iter + 1

    for (i in seq_len(nrow(overlaps))) {
      gf <- overlaps$group_from[i]
      gt <- overlaps$group_to[i]
      anchor <- overlaps$keyword[i]

      if (!is.na(group_scale[gf]) && is.na(group_scale[gt])) {
        from_val <- summaries %>%
          filter(group_id == gf, keyword == anchor) %>%
          pull(mean_hits)

        to_val <- summaries %>%
          filter(group_id == gt, keyword == anchor) %>%
          pull(mean_hits)

        if (length(from_val) == 1 && length(to_val) == 1 &&
            !is.na(to_val) && to_val > 0) {
          group_scale[gt] <- group_scale[gf] * (from_val / to_val)
          group_steps[gt] <- group_steps[gf] + 1
          changed <- TRUE
        }
      }
    }
  }

  out <- summaries %>%
    mutate(
      group_scale = unname(group_scale[group_id]),
      bridge_steps = unname(group_steps[group_id]),
      common_value = mean_hits * group_scale
    ) %>%
    filter(!is.na(common_value))

  out_best <- out %>%
    group_by(keyword) %>%
    arrange(bridge_steps, desc(mean_hits), .by_group = TRUE) %>%
    slice(1) %>%
    ungroup()

  base_value <- out_best %>%
    filter(keyword == base_term) %>%
    pull(common_value)

  membership %>%
    distinct(keyword) %>%
    left_join(out_best, by = "keyword") %>%
    mutate(
      GT_relative = common_value / base_value,
      GT_visibility = case_when(
        is.na(mean_hits) ~ NA_real_,
        TRUE ~ log10(mean_hits + 0.001) + 0.5 * (1 - pct_zero)
      ),
      GT_score = score_google_demand(GT_relative),
      GT_confidence = case_when(
        is.na(GT_relative) ~ "Insufficient signal",
        bridge_steps == 0 & n_nonzero_rep >= 2 & pct_zero < 0.50 ~ "High",
        bridge_steps <= 1 & n_nonzero_rep >= 1 ~ "Medium",
        TRUE ~ "Low"
      )
    ) %>%
    arrange(desc(GT_relative))
}

# -----------------------------
# 6) Run analysis
# -----------------------------
base_term <- activity_queries %>%
  filter(activity == "Disc Golf") %>%
  pull(query_term)

gt_results <- build_gtrends_index(
  groups = groups,
  base_term = base_term,
  time = time_window,
  geo = geo_code,
  gprop = gprop_type,
  n_rep = n_rep,
  low_value = low_value,
  sleep_seconds = sleep_sec,
  verbose = TRUE
)

# -----------------------------
# 7) Final activity table
# -----------------------------
final_table <- activity_queries %>%
  left_join(gt_results, by = c("query_term" = "keyword")) %>%
  mutate(
    GT_note = case_when(
      is.na(GT_relative) ~ "No reliable Google Trends signal with current OR query/grouping",
      pct_zero >= 0.95 ~ "Extremely intermittent search signal",
      pct_zero >= 0.75 ~ "Sparse search signal",
      TRUE ~ "Stable enough for relative comparison"
    )
  ) %>%
  rename(chosen_query = query_term) %>%
  select(
    activity, chosen_query,
    GT_relative, GT_visibility, GT_score, GT_confidence, GT_note,
    mean_hits, pct_zero, pct_lt1, max_hits,
    bridge_steps, group_id, query
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(GT_relative), activity)

print(final_table, n = nrow(final_table))

# -----------------------------
# 8) Save CSV
# -----------------------------
write_csv(final_table, "wfdf_google_demand_or_queries.csv")

# -----------------------------
# 9) Plot
# -----------------------------
plot_data <- final_table %>%
  mutate(
    GT_plot = case_when(
      is.na(GT_relative) ~ 1e-6,
      GT_relative <= 0   ~ 1e-6,
      TRUE ~ GT_relative
    )
  )

p <- ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = GT_plot, y = reorder(activity, GT_plot))) +
  geom_point(size = 2.8) +
  scale_x_log10(
    breaks = c(1e-6, 1e-4, 1e-2, 1),
    labels = c("0*", "0.0001", "0.01", "1")
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "Relative Google demand (Disc Golf = 1, log scale)",
    y = NULL,
    title = "Google Trends demand for WFDF taxonomy activities",
    subtitle = paste("Alias terms combined with Google OR queries:", time_window)
  )

print(p)

ggsave(
  filename = "wfdf_google_demand_or_queries_plot.png",
  plot = p,
  width = 9,
  height = 7,
  dpi = 300
)
```

## Time series of individual events

```{r}
# ============================================================
# Reusable Google Trends function for a chosen flying-disc activity
# ============================================================

# -----------------------------
# Packages
# -----------------------------
pkgs <- c("gtrendsR", "dplyr", "ggplot2", "lubridate", "readr", "tibble")
to_install <- pkgs[!sapply(pkgs, requireNamespace, quietly = TRUE)]
if (length(to_install) > 0) install.packages(to_install)

library(gtrendsR)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(lubridate)
library(readr)
library(tibble)

# -----------------------------
# Activity aliases
# -----------------------------
activity_aliases <- list(
  "Ultimate" = c("ultimate frisbee"),
  "Beach Ultimate" = c("beach ultimate"),
  "Goaltimate" = c("goaltimate"),
  "Hot Box" = c("hot box frisbee"),
  "World War Free" = c("world war frisbee"),
  "Double Disc Court" = c("double disc court", "ddc frisbee", "escape frisbee"),
  "Guts" = c("guts frisbee"),
  "Flutter Guts" = c("flutter guts frisbee"),
  "DodgeDisc" = c("dodgedisc", "dodgebee"),
  "Battle Royale" = c("battle royale frisbee"),
  "Discflect / KanJam" = c("kanjam", "discflect"),
  "Frisbee Hoops" = c("frisbee hoops"),
  "BeersBee" = c("beersbee", "polish horseshoes frisbee"),
  "Frisbee H-O-R-S-E" = c("frisbee horse"),
  "Accuracy" = c("accuracy frisbee"),
  "Disc Golf" = c("disc golf"),
  "Speed Lid Golf" = c("speed lid golf"),
  "Distance" = c("distance frisbee"),
  "Self-Caught Flight" = c("mta frisbee", "trc frisbee", "throw run catch"),
  "Discathon" = c("discathon frisbee", "discathon disc"),
  "Freestyle" = c("freestyle frisbee"),
  "Canine Disc" = c("disc dog", "canine disc"),
  "Overall" = c("overall flying disc", "overall frisbee")
)

# -----------------------------
# Helper functions
# -----------------------------
build_or_query <- function(terms) {
  paste(unique(terms), collapse = " + ")
}

clean_hits <- function(x, low_value = 0.5) {
  dplyr::case_when(
    x == "<1" ~ low_value,
    x == ""   ~ 0,
    TRUE      ~ suppressWarnings(as.numeric(x))
  )
}

aggregate_dates <- function(x, unit = c("month", "year")) {
  unit <- match.arg(unit)
  if (unit == "month") {
    lubridate::floor_date(x, unit = "month")
  } else {
    lubridate::floor_date(x, unit = "year")
  }
}

safe_filename <- function(x) {
  gsub("[^A-Za-z0-9]+", "_", x)
}

# -----------------------------
# Main function
# -----------------------------
plot_activity_trends <- function(chosen_activity,
                                 agg_unit = c("month", "year"),
                                 geo_code = "",
                                 time_window = "2021-03-07 2026-03-06",
                                 gprop_type = "web",
                                 low_value = 0.5,
                                 save_outputs = TRUE,
                                 output_dir = ".",
                                 verbose = TRUE) {
  
  agg_unit <- match.arg(agg_unit)
  
  if (!chosen_activity %in% names(activity_aliases)) {
    stop(
      "chosen_activity not found. Valid choices are:\n",
      paste(names(activity_aliases), collapse = ", ")
    )
  }
  
  chosen_terms <- activity_aliases[[chosen_activity]]
  chosen_query <- build_or_query(chosen_terms)
  
  if (verbose) {
    message("Chosen activity: ", chosen_activity)
    message("Chosen query: ", chosen_query)
    message("Aggregation: ", agg_unit)
    message("Geo: ", ifelse(geo_code == "", "Worldwide", geo_code))
  }
  
  gt <- gtrendsR::gtrends(
    keyword = chosen_query,
    time = time_window,
    geo = geo_code,
    gprop = gprop_type
  )
  
  gt_raw <- tibble::as_tibble(gt$interest_over_time) %>%
    dplyr::transmute(
      date = as.Date(date),
      keyword = as.character(keyword),
      hits = clean_hits(hits, low_value = low_value)
    )
  
  gt_agg <- gt_raw %>%
    dplyr::mutate(period = aggregate_dates(date, unit = agg_unit)) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(period, keyword) %>%
    dplyr::summarise(
      avg_hits = mean(hits, na.rm = TRUE),
      pct_zero = mean(hits == 0, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_hit = max(hits, na.rm = TRUE),
      n_obs = dplyr::n(),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  subtitle_geo <- ifelse(geo_code == "", "Worldwide", geo_code)
  ylab_text <- ifelse(
    agg_unit == "month",
    "Monthly Google Trends index",
    "Yearly Google Trends index"
  )
  
  p <- ggplot(gt_agg, aes(x = period, y = avg_hits)) +
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) +
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    geom_smooth(method = "loess", se = FALSE, linewidth = .5, color = "grey90") +
    theme_minimal() +
    labs(
      title = paste("Google Trends time series for", chosen_activity),
      subtitle = paste0(
        "OR query: ", chosen_query,
        " | Aggregation: ", agg_unit,
        " | Geo: ", subtitle_geo
      ),
      x = NULL,
      y = ylab_text
    )
  
  if (save_outputs) {
    safe_name <- safe_filename(chosen_activity)
    
    raw_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("google_trends_raw_", safe_name, ".csv"))
    agg_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("google_trends_", agg_unit, "_", safe_name, ".csv"))
    plot_file <- file.path(output_dir, paste0("google_trends_", agg_unit, "_", safe_name, ".png"))
    
    readr::write_csv(gt_raw, raw_file)
    readr::write_csv(gt_agg, agg_file)
    
    ggplot2::ggsave(
      filename = plot_file,
      plot = p,
      width = 9,
      height = 5,
      dpi = 300
    )
    
    if (verbose) {
      message("Saved raw data to: ", raw_file)
      message("Saved aggregated data to: ", agg_file)
      message("Saved plot to: ", plot_file)
    }
  }
  
  list(
    activity = chosen_activity,
    query = chosen_query,
    raw_data = gt_raw,
    aggregated_data = gt_agg,
    plot = p
  )
}
```

Run it

```{r}
res_ddc <- plot_activity_trends(
  chosen_activity = "Double Disc Court",
  agg_unit = "year",
  geo_code = "",
  time_window = "2015-03-07 2026-03-06"
)

res_ddc$plot
head(res_ddc$aggregated_data)
```

```{r}
res_b_ulti <- plot_activity_trends(
  chosen_activity = "Beach Ultimate",
  agg_unit = "year",
  geo_code = "",
  time_window = "2015-03-07 2026-03-06"
)

res_b_ulti$plot
head(res_b_ulti$aggregated_data)
```

```{r}
activities_to_run <- c("Double Disc Court", "Ultimate", "Disc Golf")

results <- lapply(activities_to_run, function(act) {
  plot_activity_trends(
    chosen_activity = act,
    agg_unit = "month",
    geo_code = "",
    save_outputs = TRUE
  )
})

names(results) <- activities_to_run
```
